arts.ttl: Aston Villa team news vs Club Brugge confirmed as Martinez and Rashford decisions made
arts.sum: Unai Emery has named his Aston Villa side to face Club Brugge in the second leg of their Champions League round of 16 tie Aston Villa manager Unai Emery has named his starting XI to face Club Brugge in the Champions League this evening.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa vs. Club Brugge: Team news confirmed for Champions League game, do Emiliano Martinez, Marco Asensio start?
arts.sum: Aston Villa and Club Brugge confirm their first XIs for the second leg of their Champions League last-16 tie.

arts.ttl: Martínez returns to face Club Brugge
arts.sum: Fixtures Aston Villa Vs. Club Brugge - Wed, Mar 12th 2025, 20:00 Aston Villa's starting XI has been announced ahead of Wednesday night's UEFA Champions League last 16 tie against Club Brugge. With his side 3-1 up from the first leg in Bruges, manager Unai Emery has opted to make five changes to the team that beat Brentford 1-0 on Saturday. Emi Martínez returns in goal while Ian Maatsen replaces Lucas Digne at left-back and Matty Cash is in for Axel Disasi on the other side. Further forward, Boubacar Kamara comes into midfield and Marcus Rashford joins the attack. Amadou Onana and Marco Asensio return to bolster the subs bench. Here are the teams in full... Aston Villa: Martínez, Cash, Konsa, Mings, Maatsen, Kamara, Tielemans, Rashford, Rogers, McGinn, Watkins. Subs: Olsen, Zych, Bogarde, Disasi, Digne, Torres, Asensio, Onana, Ramsey, Bailey.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa’s Marco Asensio can play against PSG in the Champions League
arts.sum: When Paris Saint-Germain loaned Marco Asensio (29) out to Aston Villa in January, they perhaps didn’t expect to be reunited with the Spaniard quite so soon. However, an unlikely reunion…

arts.ttl: Aston Villa eyeing summer move for Real Sociedad star
arts.sum: Aston Villa have regularly looked to the La Liga market in the last couple of years, and they could do so again to address the right-back position in Unai Emery’s squad. Despite having signed Andres Garcia from Levante during the winter transfer window, it appears that they have plans to make another signing in the […] The post Aston Villa eyeing summer move for Real Sociedad star appeared first on Football España.

arts.ttl: Man Utd transfer news: Marcus Rashford to embarrass Red Devils one last time
arts.sum: Manchester United ’s Marcus Rashford woes are not over despite successfully loaning the player to Aston Villa at the end of the transfer window. United to bank just €24m from Rashford sale

arts.ttl: Aston Villa vs Club Brugge LIVE match updates and team news from Champions League clash
arts.sum: Villa last hosted a Belgian side in any European competition back in April 1982 in the European Cup semi-final against Anderlecht, winning 1-0 with a goal from Tony Morley on their way to winning the trophy. Unai Emery's host the Belgian champions with a two-goal lead after winning 3-1 at the Jan Breydel Stadium last Tuesday.

arts.ttl: What Prince Williams did with Aston Villa players before Champions League tie with Club Brugge
arts.sum: Prince William paid a visit to Aston Villa training ground Bodymoor Heath on Tuesday ahead of Unai Emery men's Champions League second-leg clash with Club Brugge. Latest Aston Villa news as Unai Emery's men receive a special visit ahead of tonight's huge Champions League clash with Club Brugge
